allow: Bash(git remote rename token_watch origin && git push -u origin main)
Bash(git pull origin main --rebase && git push -u origin main)
Bash(git checkout --track origin/context && git checkout --track origin/setup && git checkout main)
Bash(git stash && git checkout --track origin/context && git checkout --track origin/setup && git checkout main && git stash pop)
Bash(venv/bin/pip install motor beanie pymongo 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(brew services start mongodb/brew/mongodb-community && sleep 3 && mongosh --eval "db.adminCommand\('ping'\)" --quiet)

Bash(venv/bin/python -c "
import asyncio
from database import connect_db, disconnect_db

async def test\(\):
    await connect_db\(\)
    print\('MongoDB connection: OK'\)
    await disconnect_db\(\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
")

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import httpx, asyncio
async def main\(\):
    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(base_url='http://localhost:8000', timeout=10\) as c:
        r = await c.post\('/api/v1/auth/register', json={'email':'probe2@example.com','password':'Password123','full_name':'Test'}\)
        print\('REGISTER:', r.status_code, r.text[:500]\)
        r2 = await c.get\('/usage/summary'\)
        print\('SUMMARY:', r2.status_code, r2.text[:300]\)
asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import asyncio, os
os.environ.setdefault\('JWT_SECRET', 'change-me-to-a-long-random-secret'\)
os.environ.setdefault\('JWT_REFRESH_SECRET', 'change-me-to-a-different-long-random-secret'\)
os.environ.setdefault\('MONGO_URI', 'mongodb://localhost:27017'\)
os.environ.setdefault\('DB_NAME', 'tokenwatch'\)

import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/Users/james-vallery/Desktop/Code/HACKCU_2026/backend'\)

from database import connect_db
from models import User
from auth import hash_password, create_access_token, create_refresh_token, pwd_context

async def test\(\):
    await connect_db\(\)
    try:
        user = User\(email='test123@example.com', password_hash=hash_password\('Password123'\), full_name='Test'\)
        await user.insert\(\)
        print\('Insert OK, id:', user.id\)
        await user.delete\(\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\('Error:', type\(e\).__name__, e\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/Users/james-vallery/Desktop/Code/HACKCU_2026/backend'\)
import os, asyncio
os.environ.update\({'MONGO_URI':'mongodb://localhost:27017','DB_NAME':'tokenwatch','JWT_SECRET':'x','JWT_REFRESH_SECRET':'y'}\)
from database import connect_db
from models import ApiCall
from beanie import PydanticObjectId

async def test\(\):
    await connect_db\(\)
    dev_id = PydanticObjectId\('000000000000000000000001'\)
    pipeline = [
        {'\\$match': {'user_id': dev_id}},
        {'\\$group': {'_id': {'\\$provider': '\\$provider', 'model': '\\$model'}, 'count': {'\\$sum': 1}}}
    ]
    try:
        rows = await ApiCall.aggregate\(pipeline\).to_list\(\)
        print\('ROWS:', rows\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\('AGG ERROR:', type\(e\).__name__, e\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(venv/bin/python -c "
import bcrypt
from auth import hash_password, verify_password, hash_token, verify_token

print\('verify correct:', verify_password\('hunter2', h\)\)
print\('verify wrong:  ', verify_password\('wrong', h\)\)
t = hash_token\('somerefreshtoken'\)
print\('verify_token:', verify_token\('somerefreshtoken', t\)\)
print\('ALL OK'\)
")
